<deliberation>
Reviewed each main REG node against the entire policy chunk, considering all 1-hop cross-references provided. Applied the rule that omissions are Non-Deviation. Checked for any contradictions, narrowings, or scope changes versus GDPR text. No contradictions identified; policy largely omits data subject rights content, which per instructions is treated as Non-Deviation.
</deliberation>
